rows.label: qev050106_MSG0001
rows.name:
For all his quiet demeanor, he harbors a raging fire
deep within him!
That is the kind of man Gi Ziorde is![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050106_MSG0002
rows.name:
Thanks to you, I was able to remember
the true nature of my sworn ally![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050106_MSG0003
rows.name:
...Hah! You were sent by our master
to fight us, weren't you?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050106_MSG0004
rows.name:
I won't show you such a pathetic display this time.
So, are you ready to go right now?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050106_SEL0011
rows.name: Say you are ready to go immediately.

rows.label: qev050106_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask for some time to prepare.

rows.label: qev050106_MSG0005
rows.name:
That's the spirit! When we fight as a pair,
we gain the strength to shatter mountains![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050106_MSG0006
rows.name:
You'd better come fully prepared!
Otherwise, you'll lose your life![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050106_MSG0007
rows.name: ...Gi Ziorde, are you ready to go?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050106_MSG0008
rows.name:
Absurd! My soul is always thirsting for battle.
To stand shoulder-to-shoulder with you like this...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050106_MSG0009
rows.name:
Let's make it a good fight! Leave your back to me.
Just swing your power around to your heart's content![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050106_MSG0010
rows.name:
Fu ha ha ha! How reliable...!
Then let's go![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050106_MSG0011
rows.name:
I came to this Arms Performance Testing Ground
expecting a serious duel, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050106_MSG0012
rows.name:
It seems someone else is already here,
itching to fight you![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050106_MSG0013
rows.name:
Why not defeat them as a warm-up?
It should be a piece of cake for you, right? Fu ha ha ha![ST:wait ]
